prompt:
## Intent

Generate a test for the status indicator

## Desired Outcome

Generate a Playwright test for the status indicator component to ensure correct rendering and state behavior.

## Repo Context

- Intent Driven Development POC workspace
- Intent Driven Development POC: Current workspace source for Intent Studio, surface library evidence flows, and built-in surface library screenshots.
- intent-poc-app verification note: Stateful UI bugs should declare and verify the requested UI state before screenshot evidence is trusted.
- intent-poc-app verification note: Prefer reusable state activation contracts over prompt-specific routing or one-off checkpoint logic.
- intent-poc-app verification note: Theme-sensitive UI bugs require paired light-mode and dark-mode screenshot evidence; do not accept a dark-mode-only capture set.

## Source Scope

- intent-poc-app
- Selected source: intent-poc-app. Prompt-matched captures: primitive-status-indicator.
- Likely owning surface: Shared Source (high confidence).

## Adaptive Boundaries

- Verify status indicator in both light and dark themes
- Use query-param activation for theme state
- Keep this draft inside intent-poc-app until the owning surface is confirmed.

## Minimum Success

- Test suite executes for primitive-status-indicator
- Paired light and dark mode screenshot evidence generated
- Generate a Playwright test for the status indicator component to ensure correct rendering and state behavior.
- The draft keeps the change centered on Shared Source instead of the whole repo.
- The final plan reuses existing verification around primitive-status-indicator.

## Baseline

- Existing primitive-status-indicator component implementation
- Capture the current baseline in Shared Source before changing behavior.
- Stay inside the prompt-matched capture scope: primitive-status-indicator.

## Verification Obligations

- Verify theme state via query-param before screenshot capture
- Include light-mode reference for dark-mode verification
- Start from existing capture coverage: primitive-status-indicator.

## Raw Intent

Generate a test for the status indicator

details: QA failures can feed directly back into the next bounded implementation attempt.

tools.label: QA verification

details: The default QA bundle runs typecheck, the deterministic code test suite, and generated Playwright specs when a source enables them.

tools.label: Evidence reporting

details: Reports become distribution inputs for downstream review and publishing surfaces.
